assumptions: Wave 5 is shipped (PR #1021) — Run schema cleanup, PAIR_ASYMMETRY enum removed, StartPairedBatchPage and PairedRunComparisonCard deleted.
Pooling visibility is shown to the user via the N/M count line ('Includes N runs of this vignette and M mirrored runs at signature vnewtd').
Pressure response is the user-facing metric the new card adds beyond the per-run table.
Direction-balanced math is non-negotiable — never overweight one direction's trial count over the other.
Card is paired-only (not shown for non-paired vignettes; not shown for aggregate runs; not shown when pressureSensitivity returns no models).
JSONB cleanup migration is skipped indefinitely.
legacyCompanionPairedRun.ts deletion is deferred to Wave 7 (it's load-bearing for pre-Wave-4 runs).
discovery.summary: Build a new pooled-vignette-metrics card to replace the deleted PairedRunComparisonCard, add a server-side methodology guard test for direction-balanced math, delete the bridge-report script and the paired-batch-run-flow doc, and clean up glossary/PRD terminology.

answers.Q1_pooling_visibility: Visible — show the N/M split in the header.
answers.Q2_columns: Option B — Win rate A, Win rate B, Pressure response, Trials.
answers.Q3_visibility: Option A — paired-only; do not show for non-paired vignettes.

non_goals: Bake bootstrap kappa CIs into snapshot (deferred to its own wave)
acceptance_criteria: New card renders for paired vignettes only
N/M count split derived client-side from useRuns + run.mirroredRuns.length (no API extension)
Pressure response null cases show tooltip with reason from API
Methodology guard test passes against current resolver, would fail on count-additive pooling
Final greps return only documented exceptions

parallel_analysis.note: Within Wave 1 (test) is independent of Wave 2 (card). Wave 3 (deletions/docs) is independent of Wave 1+2. Could parallelize via separate commits but bundling into one PR is preferred for atomic review.

annotations: Codex review: reviews/codex-spec-r1.txt (6 important findings, all addressed in spec update)
Gemini review: reviews/gemini-spec-r1.txt (2 critical + 3 important findings, all addressed in spec update)
Plan derived from updated spec § 'Order of changes' after r1 review feedback applied.
Tasks derived from updated spec § 'Implementation tasks'.

last_action_result.reason: spec/plan/tasks ready; Wave 5 is shipped; review feedback addressed
